use_cases: Primary action buttons in SaaS dashboards with interactive hover feedback
E-commerce call-to-action buttons with eye-catching animated styling
Form submission buttons with accessible focus states and pressed effects
Navigation trigger buttons requiring visual prominence
ai_summary: An animated button component featuring a spinning SVG layer in the background and a neobrutalist design with bold 8px hard shadows that reduce on hover for a pressed effect. Built for shadcn/ui compatibility with Tailwind CSS, this interactive button uses smooth transitions and accessibility-compliant focus styles. Ideal for prominent CTAs in SaaS products, e-commerce sites, and creative tool interfaces.
